fields.title: terminal_model
fields.lookupQuery: select TerminalType from TERMINAL_TYPES

fields.title: TerminalID
fields.lookupQuery:
select max(terminalID)+1 from MERCHANTS
join TERMINAL_TYPES 
on TerminalPrefix = substr(terminalID,1,5)
where TerminalType = ?

fields.title: mcc
fields.lookupQuery: select MCCCode || ' - ' || MCC_DESC from MCC

fields.title: arca_fee
fields.lookupQuery: select arca_fee from MCC_FEES where MCCFee = substr(?,1,4)

fields.title: local_fee
fields.lookupQuery: select local_fee from MCC_FEES where MCCFee = SUBSTR(?,1,4)

fields.title: international_fee
fields.lookupQuery: select international_fee from MCC_FEES where MCCFee = SUBSTR(?,1,4)

fields.title: Company_name
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(Company_name)  from MERCHANTS WHERE MerchantID = ?

fields.title: Company_name_am
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(Company_name_am)  from MERCHANTS WHERE MerchantID = ?

fields.title: city_region
fields.lookupQuery: select CityName from CITIES

fields.title: district
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DistrictName as value, DistrictName as display FROM DISTRICTS WHERE ? = 'Երևան' UNION ALL SELECT RegionName as value, RegionName as display FROM REGIONS WHERE ? != 'Երևان'

fields.title: Company_address
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(Company_address) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: Company_address_am
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(Company_address_am) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: tax_id
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(tax_id) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: bank_account
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(bank_account) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: terminal_brand
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(terminal_brand) from MERCHANTS where terminal_brand is not null

fields.title: director_name
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(director_name) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: phone
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(phone) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

fields.title: email
fields.lookupQuery: select distinct(email) from MERCHANTS where MerchantID = ?

windows.title: Transactions
windows.query: select POS_MERCHANT_ID,POS_TERMINAL_ID,ADDRESS,CARD_NUMBER,TR_AMOUNT,TR_CURRENCY,TR_DATE,TR_TIME,TR_TYPE,TR_REVERSAL,TR_AUTHCODE,TR_UTRNNO,TR_N,TR_SV_RESP,POS_DATA_CODE,ISS_,ACQ_,REFNUM,SV_TRACE,FILE_ID  from CURR_TRANS where substr(POS_TERMINAL_ID,1,5) <> '41038' limit 30000

dataSource.query: select POS_MERCHANT_ID,POS_TERMINAL_ID,ADDRESS,CARD_NUMBER,TR_AMOUNT,TR_CURRENCY,TR_DATE,TR_TIME,TR_TYPE,TR_REVERSAL,TR_AUTHCODE,TR_UTRNNO,TR_N,TR_SV_RESP,POS_DATA_CODE,ISS_,ACQ_,REFNUM,SV_TRACE,FILE_ID  from CURR_TRANS where substr(POS_TERMINAL_ID,1,5) <> '41038' limit 30000
